items.headline: Acumen Nominates 2 Therapies to Treat Alzheimer’s Disease
items.summary: By Karen Roman Acumen Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: ABOS) said it nominated ACU301 and ACU401, two candidates in its Enhanced Brain Delivery program, to treat Alzheimer’s Disease. The nomination comes after the company exercised its option with JCR Pharmaceuticals as part of a previously signed agreement, it stated. items.summary: Denali Therapeutics Inc. (NASDAQ:DNLI) is one of the 10 best AI driven biotech stocks to invest in. On May 22, Denali Therapeutics Inc.
